'''Ryk Osentay''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Journalist/Legends|reporter]] for "[[Eye on Cularin]]," a [[Cularin Central Broadcasting]] program.

Ryk acquired a nasty virus when he was beat up by a [[Radiation/Legends|radiation]]-scarred [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaught]] on the streets of [[Tolea Biqua]] on [[Genarius]].

When he first returned to work after his ordeal, he appeared on the program with a shaved head, and puffy face as a result of surgery. On this occasion, he was interviewing [[Brin Hesk'l]].
